_comment: Verified scores for matches the openfootball feed hasn't published yet. Maintained automatically by the daily scheduled task, which web-searches reputable sources (ESPN, FIFA.com, Olympics.com, Yahoo Sports, NBC, CBS, Sky Sports) and cross-checks each scoreline before writing it here. The build ALWAYS prefers the live feed, so each entry becomes a harmless no-op once the feed catches up (and can be deleted any time). Match keys (date + team1 + team2) must match the openfootball feed exactly — including play-off placeholder names like 'UEFA Path A winner'.

matches.source: South Korea 2-1 Czechia (Czech Republic = UEFA Path D winner) — ESPN/FOX/Sky Sports
Canada 1-1 Bosnia & Herzegovina (= UEFA Path A winner; Lukic for BIH, Larin 78' for Canada) — Yahoo/Olympics.com
